meta.title: Answering YOUR questions about the X-BAT VTOL FIGHTER DRONE
meta.description:
Yesterday, we published a video on Shield AI’s new X-BAT VTOL fighter drone, and I’ve gotten a lot of great questions about it on social media that I dove into trying to answer last night.

So, since I already made these video responses, I thought I might try something a little different, and put them together in one video that addresses both questions. 

Watch the original video here: https://youtu.be/GXgEqT0AR_k?si=B5PYM9t8I8UDn4z7
